prompt: hey so i'm trying to understand how authentication works in this app. like when i login what actually happens behind the scenes? and where does the token get stored?

assertions.text: Mentions JWT (JSON Web Token) as the authentication mechanism
Explains token is stored in localStorage
Describes the login flow (credentials → validation → token generation → storage)
Mentions the Authorization header format (Bearer token)
Explains JwtAuthFilter validates tokens on requests
Mentions HMAC-SHA256 or HS256 signing algorithm
